The '''KK-5 blaster pistol''' was a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] produced by [[Imperial Munitions/Legends|Imperial Munitions]] from a [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] design. As BlasTech weapons increasingly showed up in [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] hands during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the corporation was quick to show its loyalty to the throne by offering the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] a well-designed weapon. Imperial models were mired with defective prismatic crystals, however, which seriously impaired the finished KK-5's performance. Even though BlasTech continued to produce their own models, this blaster never gained popularity, and production was curtailed at the end of the war.
